allow: Bash(for marker in "UFC COMMAND" "SHIELD" "OCTAGON PRESS" "FIGHT IQ" "CAGE CONTROL" "ROUNDUP" "HYPE MAN" "POLYGLOT" "ORACLE" "STAT SHEET" "PULSE" "WATCHDOG" "REFEREE" "VITALS")
Bash(for marker in "UFC COMMAND" "STAT SHEET" "PULSE" "VITALS" "HYPE MAN" "POLYGLOT" "OCTAGON PRESS" "FIGHT IQ" "CAGE CONTROL" "REFEREE" "WATCHDOG" "ROUNDUP" "ORACLE")
Bash(__NEW_LINE_9e0b7a5618b88fbe__ echo "Checking dashboard.jsx for V1 patterns...")

Bash(__NEW_LINE_e9f3d1d35e836d6e__ curl -s -N -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""prompt"":""publiquem uma noticia sobre quem ira ganhar a luta de amanha usando estética. A noticia precisam estar disponível em todas as línguas e levar os leitores a pensarem""}' http://localhost:3010/api/company/prompt)
Bash($PSQL "postgresql://ufcnews:ufcnews123@localhost:5432/ufc_news_hub" -c "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = ''public'' ORDER BY table_name;")

Bash($PSQL "postgresql://ufcnews:ufcnews123@localhost:5432/ufc_news_hub" -c "SELECT table_name, column_name, data_type, character_maximum_length, numeric_precision, is_nullable, column_default FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = ''public'' ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position;")

Bash($PSQL "postgresql://ufcnews:ufcnews123@localhost:5432/ufc_news_hub" -c "SELECT tc.table_name, kcu.column_name, ccu.table_name AS foreign_table_name, ccu.column_name AS foreign_column_name FROM information_schema.table_constraints AS tc JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage AS kcu ON tc.constraint_name = kcu.constraint_name AND tc.table_schema = kcu.table_schema JOIN information_schema.constraint_column_usage AS ccu ON ccu.constraint_name = tc.constraint_name AND ccu.table_schema = tc.table_schema WHERE tc.constraint_type = ''FOREIGN KEY'' ORDER BY tc.table_name;")
Bash($PSQL "postgresql://ufcnews:ufcnews123@localhost:5432/ufc_news_hub" -c "SELECT tablename, indexname, indexdef FROM pg_indexes WHERE schemaname = ''public'' ORDER BY tablename, indexname;")
Bash($PSQL "postgresql://ufcnews:ufcnews123@localhost:5432/ufc_news_hub" -c "SELECT relname, n_live_tup FROM pg_stat_user_tables ORDER BY relname;")

Bash($PSQL "postgresql://ufcnews:ufcnews123@localhost:5432/ufc_news_hub" -c "SELECT tc.table_name, tc.constraint_name, tc.constraint_type, kcu.column_name FROM information_schema.table_constraints tc JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage kcu ON tc.constraint_name = kcu.constraint_name AND tc.table_schema = kcu.table_schema WHERE tc.table_schema = ''public'' AND tc.constraint_type IN \(''PRIMARY KEY'', ''UNIQUE''\) ORDER BY tc.table_name, tc.constraint_name, kcu.ordinal_position;")

Bash($PSQL "postgresql://ufcnews:ufcnews123@localhost:5432/ufc_news_hub" -c "SELECT t.typname AS enum_name, e.enumlabel AS enum_value FROM pg_type t JOIN pg_enum e ON t.oid = e.enumtypid JOIN pg_catalog.pg_namespace n ON n.oid = t.typnamespace WHERE n.nspname = ''public'' ORDER BY t.typname, e.enumsortorder;")

Bash($PSQL "postgresql://ufcnews:ufcnews123@localhost:5432/ufc_news_hub" -c "SELECT conrelid::regclass AS table_name, conname AS constraint_name, pg_get_constraintdef\(oid\) AS constraint_def FROM pg_constraint WHERE contype = ''c'' AND connamespace = ''public''::regnamespace ORDER BY conrelid::regclass::text, conname;")
Bash($PSQL "postgresql://ufcnews:ufcnews123@localhost:5432/ufc_news_hub" -c "SELECT schemaname, viewname, definition FROM pg_views WHERE schemaname = ''public'' ORDER BY viewname;")

Bash($PSQL "postgresql://ufcnews:ufcnews123@localhost:5432/ufc_news_hub" -t -A -F'|' -c "SELECT table_name, column_name, data_type, character_maximum_length, numeric_precision, is_nullable, column_default FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = ''public'' ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position;")

Bash($PSQL "postgresql://ufcnews:ufcnews123@localhost:5432/ufc_news_hub" -t -A -c "SELECT viewname, pg_get_viewdef\(viewname::regclass, true\) FROM pg_views WHERE schemaname = ''public'' ORDER BY viewname;")
